title: Smoked Meat Kebabs with Ukrainian Twist
description: A fusion of Ukrainian and smoky flavors in a classic kebab dish, featuring charred meat, served with a side of roasted vegetables.

ingredients.name: Pork Shoulder, boneless
ingredients.notes: Ask your butcher to char the pork shoulder before slicing

ingredients.name: Red Bell Pepper
ingredients.notes: Optional: add some smoky flavor by grilling the pepper before slicing

ingredients.name: Onion
ingredients.notes: Caramelize the onions before adding to the kebabs

ingredients.name: Garlic, minced
ingredients.notes: Add a pinch of black pepper for extra flavor

ingredients.name: Smoked Paprika
ingredients.notes: Add a hint of smokiness to the kebabs

ingredients.name: Salt
ingredients.notes: Use sea salt for the best flavor

ingredients.name: Fresh Dill
ingredients.notes: Garnish with fresh dill for a Ukrainian touch

ingredients.name: Lemon Juice
ingredients.notes: Add a squeeze of lemon juice for brightness

ingredients.name: Olive Oil
ingredients.notes: Use a neutral oil for grilling

instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, lemon juice, smoked paprika, salt, and black pepper.
Add the sliced pork, red bell pepper, onion, and garlic to the bowl. Toss to coat with the marinade.
Thread the pork and vegetables onto skewers, leaving a little space between each piece.
Grill the kebabs for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally, until the pork is cooked through and the vegetables are tender.
Transfer the kebabs to a plate and garnish with chopped fresh dill.
Serve immediately, with a side of roasted vegetables or a salad.
